description: Oso Cloud is an authorization service for managing policies, facts, and authorization checks for applications. It provides hosted and local-development tools for policy authoring, data management, and permission evaluation.
summary: Oso exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at `https://api.osohq.com/api`, a local stdio MCP server launched via the `oso-cloud` CLI, and the `oso-cloud` CLI itself; all documented developer access uses an Oso Cloud API key.
